hero.tagline: I find the pattern in the noise then build something from it.
hero.bio: Give me a tangle of ideas and I'll map the system underneath. I work at the intersection of design, code, and language: translating complex problems into clear structures, and clear structures into things that actually work. I think in systems, build in layers, and tell the story along the way.
hero.roles: Full Stack Developer • Systems Thinker • Designer • Storyteller • Builder

about.title: Designer. Writer. Developer.
about.quote: The rare combination of visual thinking, clear communication, and solid technical build.
about.bio1: I studied at the Gerrit Rietveld Academie and graduated in graphic design from SAE Institute Amsterdam. After that I trained at the Schrijversacademie — not as a hobby, but because good code and good communication demand the same discipline: precise, clear, no noise. That's exactly what I bring as a developer.
about.bio2: Over 20 years of hands-on experience in SME: from advertising campaigns for Renault to communications projects for the Municipality of Amsterdam. At KLM I wrote blogs and took part in the first RTL4 television documentary about aviation during the COVID pandemic — alongside Pieter Elbers, among others. I know how real commissions work: client conversations, deadlines, feedback rounds, and delivering what actually works. Now I build with React and Spring Boot, and I still deliver the same way: straight, skilled, and with full attention to the end user.

skills.stack: Full stack: React, Spring Boot, Git
